name: SelectInputWithPrefix
description: A display component for select input values with optional prefix icon or element.
usage_guidelines: Use with Select component's customInputDisplay prop.
Shows prefix icon/element alongside selected label.
Control prefix visibility with showPrefix prop.

styling_info.visual_description: Horizontal flex layout with prefix and label. Prefix and label are vertically centered with gap.
